## What happened

Describe what went wrong. Be specific — "the agent broke" is less useful than "the agent ran `git reset --hard` despite the Forbidden Commands rule."

## What you expected

What should have happened instead.

## Environment

- **Platform:** Claude Code / Codex / Claude.ai / Other
- **OS:** macOS / Linux / Windows WSL / Cloud VM
- **Project type:** Node / Python / Go / Rust / Other
- **Elves version:** (check `metadata.version` in SKILL.md)

## How to reproduce

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. ...

## Relevant logs

If possible, paste the relevant section of the execution log or survival guide. Redact any secrets or proprietary code.

```
(paste here)
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, the kickoff prompt you used, whether the run was overnight or attended.
